edge: The proposed human body representation aims to achieve fine-grained semantics and high reconstruction-accuracy in an unsupervised setting.
A correspondence is established between latent vectors and geometric measures of body parts, enabling controllable editing of human bodies by modifying the corresponding latent codes.
